name: Scheduler
description: Create, list, and cancel scheduled tasks — reminders, recurring jobs, delayed execution, and cron-based triggers.
brief: You can schedule reminders and delayed messages using the `scheduler` skill. Load it with `use_skill('scheduler')` to access `create_schedule`, `list_schedules`, and `cancel_schedule`. When creating a reminder, use `action_type="agent_message"` — the scheduler will notify you at the specified time.
author: Evonic
